---
title: "Simulation Study"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-28"
---
#package libraries
```{r}
library(emmeans)
library(multcompView)
library(dplyr)
library(lsmeans)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
```

#Simple Simulation Study
```{r}
set.seed(001)

n_simulations = 50000

n_observations = 50 

true_mean <- 5

single_simulation <- function(n) {
  x <- rnorm(50, mean = 5, sd = 2)

  #T-test
  CI <- t.test(x)$conf.int
  
  return(c(lower = CI[1], upper = CI[2]))
}

results <- replicate(n_simulations, single_simulation(n_observations))

results_df <- as.data.frame(t(results))

head(results_df)

is_inside <- (true_mean >= results_df$lower) & (true_mean <= results_df$upper)
print((n_simulations - sum(is_inside))/n_simulations)


```

#Complex Simulation (RCBD)
```{r}
#set seed 
set.seed(002)

n_simulations <- 4000

#Designate Number of Treatments and Blocks
n_blocks = 7

n_treatment = 8

#Simulation for RCBD
single_RCBD_Simulation <- function(n) { 
 

# Build treatment and block structure
  treatments <- rep(1:n_treatment, times = n_blocks)   
  blocks     <- rep(1:n_blocks, each = n_treatment)
  

#Designate Values for RCBD
Mu <- 0 
Tau <- c(0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0) 
Beta <- rep(rnorm(n_blocks, 0, 3), each = n_treatment)
Sigma <- rnorm(n_treatment * n_blocks, 0, 3)

  x <- Mu + Tau + Beta + Sigma
  
  
#Build DataFrame for fake data
  sim_data <- data.frame(
    x = x, 
    treatment = as.factor(treatments),
    block = as.factor(blocks)
  )
  
  
  #Fitting of RCBD Model
  model <- aov(x ~ treatment + block, data = sim_data ) 
  
  
  p_value <- summary(model)[[1]]["treatment", "Pr(>F)"]
  return(p_value)
  
}

results <- replicate(n_simulations, single_RCBD_Simulation())

results_df <- data.frame(p_value = results)

sum(results_df$p_value < 0.05)

# View first few p-values
head(results_df)

# Full summary
summary(results_df)

# Count significant results
cat("Significant results:", sum(results_df$p_value < 0.05), "\n")
cat("Type I error rate:", mean(results_df$p_value < 0.05), "\n")

```


#Finding Sigma Using Target R2
```{r}
set.seed(002)
n_simulations = 5000
n_T <- 7
n_B <- 8
Mu  <- 120  # you need a grand mean

alpha   <- c(-3, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, 3)
#alpha_t <- alpha - mean(alpha)

beta   <- c(-5, 4, -7, 6, 8, 12, -13, 3)
beta_b <- beta - mean(beta)

V_tb     <- outer(alpha, beta_b, function(a,b) (Mu + a + b)^2)        
V_bar    <- mean(V_tb)     
R2_target <- 0.5

# Cell means matrix
mu_matrix <- outer(alpha, beta, function(a, b) Mu + a + b)

# Signal
S <- sum((mu_matrix - mean(mu_matrix))^2)

# Solve for sigma²
sigma2 <- S * (R2_target - 1) /
          (V_bar * ((n_T + n_B - 2) - R2_target * (n_T * n_B - 1)))

sigma <- sqrt(sigma2)

cat("S      =", round(S, 4),      "\n")
cat("sigma² =", round(sigma2, 4), "\n")
cat("sigma  =", round(sigma, 4),  "\n")

# Verify by plugging back into R²_theory formula (should equal 0.5)
R2_check <- (S + (n_T + n_B - 2) * sigma2 * V_bar) /
            (S + (n_T * n_B - 1) * sigma2 * V_bar)

cat("R²_theory check =", round(R2_check, 4), "\n")
```

#Run the simulation
```{r}
set.seed(002)
 #creates sigma^2V_tb
Var_matrix <- sigma2 * V_tb

#Creates the a and b values
a_matrix <- (1 / sqrt(Var_matrix)) * sqrt(log(1 + Var_matrix / mu_matrix^2))

b_matrix <- log(mu_matrix) - a_matrix * mu_matrix - ((a_matrix^2 * Var_matrix) / 2)

#function used to simulate the data 

run_once <- function() {
  Y1 <- matrix(rnorm(n_T * n_B, mean = as.vector(mu_matrix), sd =sqrt(Var_matrix)), nrow = n_T, ncol = n_B)
  
  Y2 <- exp(a_matrix * Y1 + b_matrix)
  
  Y3 <- log(Y2)
  
  Y4 <- exp(Y1)
#Reshape the data to be more user friendly 
  
make_df <- function(Y_mat, label) {
  data.frame(
    y         = as.vector(Y_mat),
    treatment = as.factor(rep(1:n_T, times = n_B)),
    block     = as.factor(rep(1:n_B, each  = n_T)),
    version   = label
  )
}

dat <- rbind(
  make_df(Y1, "Y1_normal"),
  make_df(Y2, "Y2_lognormal"),
  make_df(Y3, "Y3_log_Y2"),
  make_df(Y4, "Y4_exp_Y1")
)

#Running Analysis on the Simulated Data

versions <- c("Y1_normal", "Y2_lognormal", "Y3_log_Y2", "Y4_exp_Y1")

results <- lapply(versions, function(v) {
  d     <- subset(dat, version == v)
  model <- aov(y ~ treatment + block, data = d)
  s     <- summary(model)[[1]]
  p_val  <- s["treatment", "Pr(>F)"]
  f_stat <- s["treatment", "F value"]
  r2     <- 1 - s["Residuals", "Sum Sq"] / sum(s[, "Sum Sq"])
  data.frame(versions = v, p_value = p_val, f_stat = f_stat, r2 = r2)
})

do.call(rbind, results)

}
all_results <- do.call(rbind, replicate(n_simulations, run_once(), simplify = FALSE))
summary_tbl5 <- all_results %>%
  group_by(versions) %>%
  summarise(
    power   = mean(p_value < 0.05),
    mean_F  = mean(f_stat),
    mean_R2 = mean(r2),
    sd_R2   = sd(r2)
  )
```

#Quick Notes for reference 
#summary_tbl1 var = 1 
#summary_tbl2 var = (Mu + alpha_t + beta_b)^2) outer(alpha_t, beta_b, function(a, b) (Mu + a + b)^2)
#summary_tbl3 var = (Mu + alpha_t)^2
#summary_tbl4 var = (alpha_t)^2
#summary_tbl5 var = (beta_b)^2
